## Cloud Providers

A list of cloud services supporting BSD systems with verification details:

- **AWS Lightsail**  
  - URL: [https://aws.amazon.com/lightsail](https://aws.amazon.com/lightsail)  
  - Supported Versions: FreeBSD 15.0, 14.3, and 13.5  
  - Verification Date: 31 March 2026

- **Hawk Host**  
  - URL: [https://www.hawkhost.com](https://www.hawkhost.com)  
  - Supported Versions: FreeBSD 14 and 13  
  - Verification Date: 31 March 2026

- **Server Space**  
  - URL: [https://serverspace.io](https://serverspace.io)  
  - Supported Versions: FreeBSD 14  
  - Verification Date: 31 March 2026

- **Vultr**  
  - URL: [https://www.vultr.com](https://www.vultr.com)  
  - Supported Versions: FreeBSD 15, 14, and 13; OpenBSD 7.8 and 7.7  
  - Verification Date: 31 March 2026

## Sites

- **vermaden**  
  - URL: [https://vermaden.wordpress.com](https://vermaden.wordpress.com)

## Operating Systems

A list of BSD-based operating systems, with notes on compatibility:

- **DragonFly BSD**  
  - URL: [https://www.dragonflybsd.org](https://www.dragonflybsd.org)

- **FreeBSD**  
  - URL: [https://www.freebsd.org](https://www.freebsd.org)  
  - Notes: Runs smoothly on VirtualBox and is beginner-friendly

- **GhostBSD**  
  - URL: [https://www.ghostbsd.org](https://www.ghostbsd.org)

- **helloSystem**  
  - URL: [https://github.com/helloSystem/hello](https://github.com/helloSystem/hello)

- **MidnightBSD**  
  - URL: [https://www.midnightbsd.org](https://www.midnightbsd.org)

- **NetBSD**  
  - URL: [https://www.netbsd.org](https://www.netbsd.org)  
  - Notes: Runs smoothly on VirtualBox and is beginner-friendly

- **NomadBSD**  
  - URL: [https://nomadbsd.org](https://nomadbsd.org)

- **OpenBSD**  
  - URL: [https://www.openbsd.org](https://www.openbsd.org)  
  - Notes: Tends to run slowly on VirtualBox; however, it remains beginner-friendly
